subject: [PATCH v5 1/2] firmware_loader: add search= module option for multi-path firmware lookup

2026-03-23.patch_summary: This patch adds a new firmware_class.search= module option that allows users to specify multiple paths for firmware lookup. The input is preprocessed at boot or sysfs write time into a NUL-separated sequence of paths, avoiding per-load parsing overhead. The firmware lookup order is first the legacy path specified by firmware_class.path=, then the colon-separated paths specified by firmware_class.search=, and finally built-in default paths. This allows for more flexible and customizable firmware loading behavior.
